task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness VMS interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness web interface (accessed via https://localhost:7001) or desktop client is visible on the screen, showing the login screen or the main dashboard.

task_completion.description: Rename the 'Parking Lot Camera' to the new corporate standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The camera list, resource tree, or camera settings panel shows a camera named 'HQ-EXT-PKG-01'.

task_completion.description: Rename the 'Entrance Camera' to the new corporate standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The camera list, resource tree, or camera settings panel shows a camera named 'HQ-1F-ENT-01'.

task_completion.description: Rename the 'Server Room Camera' to the new corporate standard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The camera list, resource tree, or camera settings panel shows a camera named 'HQ-B1-SVR-01'.

task_completion.description: Rename the 'Lobby Camera' and 'Loading Dock Camera' if they are present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The camera list shows 'HQ-1F-LBY-01' and/or 'HQ-EXT-LDK-01'. If neither original camera was present in the system, award these points automatically if the other renames are correct.

task_completion.description: Ensure no cameras retain their old informal names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final view of the camera list/resource tree, there are no cameras with informal names like 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', 'Server Room Camera', 'Lobby Camera', or 'Loading Dock Camera'. All visible cameras follow the 'BLDG-FLOOR-ZONE-SEQ' format (e.g., starting with 'HQ-').

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Nx Witness GUI to perform the renames.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Nx Witness web or desktop interface to change camera settings, rather than using a terminal to send curl/API commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The renamed cameras must be visible inside the actual Nx Witness VMS resource tree or settings panels, not typed into a text editor, spreadsheet, or notes application.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM elements containing the camera names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires standardizing camera names in the Nx Witness VMS (accessed at https://localhost:7001). The verified expected mappings are: 'Parking Lot Camera' -> 'HQ-EXT-PKG-01', 'Entrance Camera' -> 'HQ-1F-ENT-01', 'Server Room Camera' -> 'HQ-B1-SVR-01', 'Lobby Camera' -> 'HQ-1F-LBY-01', and 'Loading Dock Camera' -> 'HQ-EXT-LDK-01'. The final state must show these exact new names in the VMS camera list, with none of the old informal names remaining.
